title: Living in Boulder Vlog 4- 4 - 2018: Did taxes

enrichment.summary: Kyle recaps a low-key Wednesday: sleeping in, visiting his mom's house for a home-cooked meal, and finishing his taxes with her help. He plans to go on a bike/training ride the next morning and reflects on the uniqueness of his daily vlog format.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Nobody else vlogs every day about daily events the way he does — it's a unique and valuable genre
Everyone has off days; he's generally a hard worker and doesn't feel guilty about one unproductive day
Daily training documentation is a great content format he wants to start
